message:
feat: wire HandleProcessTriageLifecycle into all workflow registration points

Registers the new HandleProcessTriageLifecycle workflow in every
location where workflows are constructed:

- mcp.rs: added to builtin_workflows() and imported in the use block
- main.rs: registered in 6 separate workflow construction sites:
  - build_workflow_by_name lookup table
  - resolve_workflow name→instance mapper
  - run_watcher workflow runner initialization
  - robot mode workflow listing (RobotWorkflowInfo with
    process_triage.lifecycle trigger event type)
  - workflow test/inspect command paths (2 locations)
  - updated test assertion from 6 to 7 workflows with name check

This ensures the process triage lifecycle is available for triggering
via MCP tools, the watcher daemon, robot mode introspection, and
CLI workflow commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
